Good Health and Well-being.reason: Course applies testing in 'counseling and clinical fields' (諮商與臨床領域), directly supporting the promotion of mental health and well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: Course focuses on the 'educational testing field' (教育測驗領域), which is crucial for assessing and ensuring effective learning outcomes (Target 4.1).

Gender Equality.reason: The core competence of 'Multiculturalism' (多元文化關懷) and 'ethical considerations' infers the creation of non-discriminatory tests, supporting gender equality (Target 5.1, 5.c).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Application in 'industrial and organizational fields' (工商及組織領域) directly supports Target 8.5 by improving personnel selection and fostering productive employment.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course teaches the entire process to 'Construct Tests' and perform 'Tests Evaluation,' which aligns with enhancing scientific research and innovation (Target 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The core competence of 'Multiculturalism' (多元文化關懷) and 'ethical considerations' directly addresses creating fair assessments to ensure equal opportunity for all (Target 10.2, 10.3).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The principles of creating valid tests with 'ethical considerations' (道德考量) can contribute to building effective, accountable, and non-discriminatory institutions (Target 16.6, 16.b).
